name: Hair by William
description: El Paso hair salon — book appointments, call, WhatsApp, view portfolio and services, get directions. Guest-friendly; no account required.

actions.name: Book Appointment
actions.description: Request an appointment for extensions, precision cuts, color correction, or Brazilian Blowout. Opens the guest booking form (#contact).

actions.name: Submit Appointment Request
actions.description: Fill name, phone, and preferred service, then send via WhatsApp or SMS. No website account.

actions.name: Book via WhatsApp
actions.description: Send a prefilled appointment request to Hair by William on WhatsApp.

actions.name: Book via Text / SMS
actions.description: Send a prefilled appointment request by SMS to 915-920-7823.

actions.name: Open WhatsApp
actions.description: Open a WhatsApp chat with Hair by William without filling the form first. Guest-friendly.

actions.name: Call Salon
actions.description: Call Hair by William at +1-915-920-7823 to book. Open Friday–Saturday 10 AM–6 PM. No login.

actions.name: Get Directions
actions.description: Open Google Maps directions to 5411 N. Mesa, Suite 13C, El Paso, TX 79912.

actions.name: Open Location
actions.description: View Hair by William at LV Hair Salon — 5411 N. Mesa, Suite 13C, El Paso, TX 79912.

actions.name: View Portfolio
actions.description: Browse salon portfolio of hair extensions, color, cuts, and blowouts.

actions.name: View Services
actions.description: See signature services: hair extensions, Brazilian Blowout, precision cuts, color correction.
